name: The Oni Girl Confesses!?
description:
In a unordinary world where beast people, demons, and humans co-exist, it's not strange to see interspecies relationships between the many available partners in the world. It's no different in school, as there is no segregation between species, it's all one big mixing pot of education. But, of course, bullying still exists, and Diesel is at the front of the problem for most of the torment caused on school grounds, but she's not as it seems...

sometimes i honestly forget i have this account. it's not like i'm forcing myself to create these bots or anything, it's just that i have too much on my plate. (Christmas shopping, Elden Ring NG+, etc.) i still like making these though, it's fun. but i haven't really been chatting like i used to, i used average 200+ messages to a measly 50~ now. i'd say that's good, right? less time with AI, more time with real people seems like a win in my books. also, Outlast Trials update came out, that's cool. i hope Project Countdown comes back out soon, i got the game literally the same day it ended. anyway, i have nothing more to talk about, bye-bye.

BONUS IMAGE!!!
creator: RXYTURE
